arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsdale's secret transfer clause puts Premier League clubs on red alert
arts.sum: England goalkeeper Aaron Ramsdale completed a big-money switch to Southampton last summer but it appears that the former Arsenal star could potentially be on the move again soon

arts.ttl: Chelsea receive Joao Felix update as Man Utd eye AMBITIOUS transfer
arts.sum: Milan are one of the clubs linked with a permanent move for Felix, and Chelsea have been tipped to include the 25-year-old in a swap deal bid for the aforementioned Leao. The Portugal international struggled to break into Chelsea’s favoured starting XI following his arrival from Atletico Madrid last year, amid significant competition from Cole Palmer, and he is expected to leave the club in the 2025 summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Chelsea v Southampton line-ups: Sancho starts, Fofana on the bench
arts.sum: Jadon Sancho starts for Chelsea at Stamford Bridge tonight, while keeper Filip Jorgensen keeps his place in the side. The Blues have made two changes, with Sancho coming in for Reece James and Tosin Adarabioyo replacing the injured Trevoh Chalobah. Wes Fofana is back in the squad after injury and is among Chelsea’s substitutes. arts.ttl: Man Utd urged to HIJACK €60m Chelsea deal
arts.sum: Manchester United have been urged to beat Chelsea to the signing of Crystal Palace defender Marc Guehi this summer. However, former Chelsea forward Tony Cascarino believes that Guehi is ideally suited to playing in Ruben Amorim’s 3-4-3 system at Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Why Chelsea fans are protesting as Roman Abramovich message sent again and Todd Boehly's role
arts.sum: Chelsea's Premier League finishes under Clearlake-Boehly are 12th and sixth, with anything from 10th to third still possible for this season. But why are Chelsea supporters taking this opportunity to protest?

arts.ttl: Report: Why Chelsea loanee Carney Chukwuemeka may not be sold to Borussia Dortmund this summer despite impressive start
arts.sum: Dortmund need to turn their season around quickly.

arts.ttl: How to watch Chelsea vs Southampton - TV channel, live stream and kick-off time - football.london
arts.sum: Yes, TNT Sports will be broadcasting the midweek round of fixtures in the Premier League, which will include Chelsea's match against the Saints. Chelsea's last win in the Premier League came against West Ham on February 3, and the Blues will want to claim another three points when they take on Southampton in the capital.
